title: BROMANTANE
description: Bromantane is a unique Russian compound that acts as both an actoprotector (enhancing physical performance) and an anxiolytic. It upregulates tyrosine hydroxylase and dopamine synthesis without direct receptor stimulation, providing stimulation without tolerance.

research.title: Effects of bromantane on offspring maturation and development of reflexes
research.summary: Bromantane demonstrates no adverse effects on reproduction and offspring development, with no significant differences in offspring weight gain or nervous system development.

research.title: Effect of bromantane on the release and metabolism of dopamine in the striatum of freely moving rats
research.summary: Bromantane increases dopamine release in the striatum of rats for 8 hours, slightly decreasing dopamine metabolites.

research.title: Analysis of bromantane pharmacological spectrum
research.summary: Bromantane exhibits psychostimulatory and anxiolytic effects, with no effect on BALB/c mice and freezing prevention in C57B1/6 mice.

research.title: The effect of bromantane on the dopamin- and serotoninergic systems of the rat brain
research.summary: Bromantane increases serotonin levels in the brain and affects dopamine levels, suggesting a role for the dopaminergic system in its pharmacological effects.

research.title: The neuro- and psychophysiological effects of bromantane
research.summary: Bromantane improves operators' functional state, promoting moderate vigilance and productive action while reducing tremors.

research.title: A quantitative pharmaco-electroencephalographic analysis of the action of bromantane
research.summary: Bromantane demonstrates more marked and prolonged stimulant properties than other adamantane psychostimulants, with a two-phase effect lasting up to 8 hours.

sentiment.summary: Users praise its unique combination of stimulation and anxiety relief without tolerance buildup. Commonly used for motivation and physical performance enhancement.

effects.label: Tolerance-Neutral:
effects.description: Doesn't seem to cause traditional stimulant tolerance.

effects.label: Cumulative Benefits:
effects.description: Dopamine upregulation may persist after cessation.

effects.label: Consistent Effects:
effects.description: Most users report reliable, predictable results.

dosage.label: Sublingual Option:
dosage.description: Can be taken sublingually for faster onset.

dosage.label: Morning Dosing:
dosage.description: Best taken in the morning due to mild stimulation.

sideEffects.label: Potential Stimulation:
sideEffects.description: May cause restlessness in sensitive individuals.

sideEffects.label: Limited Research:
sideEffects.description: Long-term safety data limited in Western literature.

availability.label: Research Chemical:
availability.description: Available from various research chemical suppliers.

availability.label: Russian Origin:
availability.description: Originally developed in Russia as Ladasten.
